llm_raw.summary: Critical regulatory elements are missing: no nicotine warning banner, no 18+ icon, and no risk communication text. The ZONNIC logo is detected, but without evidence of the C halo or correct colour usage. No background or content compliance can be confirmed due to lack of visual signals. Immediate fixes are required for legal and brand compliance.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include a bilingual nicotine warning statement banner at the TOP of the creative.
violations.issue: Nicotine warning statement is missing from the top of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add a bilingual nicotine warning banner at the top: 'WARNING: This product contains nicotine. Nicotine is highly addictive. Only to be used by adults who are trying to quit smoking.' and 'AVERTISSEMENT : Ce produit contient de la nicotine. La nicotine crée une forte dépendance. À utiliser uniquement par des adultes qui désirent cesser de fumer.'
violations.evidence: No text matching the required warning detected in OCR or text signals.

violations.rule_text: The 18+ icon must be present on marketing materials to indicate age restriction.
violations.issue: 18+ age restriction icon is missing from the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add a circular 18+ icon at the bottom of the creative.
violations.evidence: No shape or text matching '18+' detected in vision signals.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include risk communication text at the BOTTOM of the creative.
violations.issue: Risk communication text is missing from the bottom of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the risk communication text at the bottom: 'This product may not be right for you. Always read and follow the label.'
violations.evidence: No text matching the required risk communication detected in OCR or text signals.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning banner must be positioned at the TOP of the asset. The risk communication and 18+ icon must be at the BOTTOM. This placement is consistent across all compliant examples in the guidelines.
violations.issue: Required regulatory elements (nicotine warning, risk communication, 18+ icon) are missing and not positioned correctly.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the nicotine warning banner at the top and the risk communication text plus 18+ icon at the bottom.
violations.evidence: No evidence of required elements at top or bottom positions in vision signals.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning must appear in BOTH English and French on every asset. English uses 'WARNING:', French uses 'AVERTISSEMENT :'.
violations.issue: Bilingual nicotine warning (English and French) is missing.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add both English and French nicotine warnings at the top of the creative.
violations.evidence: No text matching 'WARNING:' or 'AVERTISSEMENT :' detected in OCR or text signals.

violations.rule_text: Don't lose the C halo (logo without any halo on the C).
violations.issue: No evidence of a circular halo around the C in the ZONNIC logo.
violations.fix_suggestion: Ensure the ZONNIC logo includes a circular halo around the C, using the correct flavour colour.
violations.evidence: OCR detects 'ZONNIC' but no shape detection or visual evidence of a halo around the C.

violations.rule_text: The ZONNIC logo consists of navy blue typographic text with a circular halo around the letter C. The halo colour varies by product flavour profile.
violations.issue: Logo detected but no evidence of the C halo or correct colour usage.
violations.fix_suggestion: Use the full ZONNIC logo with navy blue text and a circular halo around the C in the correct flavour colour.
violations.evidence: OCR detects 'ZONNIC' but no shape or colour analysis confirms the halo or navy blue text.

passed_details.detail: ZONNIC text detected in the image (OCR confidence 0.991), indicating brand presence.
